mapper.select:
select s.streamer_id as streamerId, s.stage_name as stageName, coalesce(dr.totalXu, 0) as totalXu, coalesce(dr.reportDays, 0) as reportDays, coalesce(gr.giftXu, 0) as giftXu, coalesce(gr.giftCustomers, 0) as giftCustomers, coalesce(cc.chatCustomers, 0) as chatCustomers from live_streamer s left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as totalXu, count(*) as reportDays from live_daily_report where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) dr on dr.streamer_id = s.streamer_id left join ( select streamer_id, sum(xu) as giftXu, count(distinct customer_id) as giftCustomers from live_gift_record where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) gr on gr.streamer_id = s.streamer_id left join ( select streamer_id, count(distinct customer_id) as chatCustomers from live_chat_contact where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) cc on cc.streamer_id = s.streamer_id where s.status = '0'
order by totalXu desc, s.streamer_id

select s.streamer_id as streamerId, coalesce(sum(r.total_xu), 0) as previousTotalXu from live_streamer s left join live_daily_report r on r.streamer_id = s.streamer_id and r.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} where s.status = '0'
group by s.streamer_id

select s.streamer_id as streamerId, s.stage_name as stageName, -- 送礼：日/周/上周/月 coalesce(daily.xu, 0) as dailyXu, coalesce(weekly.xu, 0) as weeklyXu, coalesce(lastWeek.xu, 0) as lastWeekXu, coalesce(currentWeek.xu, 0) as currentWeekXu, coalesce(currentLastWeek.xu, 0) as currentLastWeekXu, coalesce(monthly.xu, 0) as monthlyXu, coalesce(kpiMonth.xu, 0) as kpiMonthXu, -- 新增粉丝：日/周/月（首次出现） coalesce(newFans.daily, 0) as newFanDaily, coalesce(newFans.weekly, 0) as newFanWeekly, coalesce(newFans.lastWeek, 0) as newFanLastWeek, coalesce(newFans.monthly, 0) as newFanMonthly, -- 新增互动人数：日/周/月（聊天联系人） coalesce(chat.daily, 0) as chatDaily, coalesce(chat.weekly, 0) as chatWeekly, coalesce(chat.lastWeek, 0) as chatLastWeek, coalesce(chat.monthly, 0) as chatMonthly, -- 新增用户打赏：日/周/月（首次打赏在本月） coalesce(newTippers.daily, 0) as newTipDaily, coalesce(newTippers.weekly, 0) as newTipWeekly, coalesce(newTippers.monthly, 0) as newTipMonthly, coalesce(newTippers.dailyAmount, 0) as newTipDailyAmount, coalesce(newTippers.weeklyAmount, 0) as newTipWeeklyAmount, coalesce(newTippers.lastWeekAmount, 0) as newTipLastWeekAmount, coalesce(newTippers.monthlyAmount, 0) as newTipMonthlyAmount, -- 客户统计 coalesce(monthlyCustomers.count, 0) as monthlyCustomers, coalesce(monthlyCustomers.highValue, 0) as highValueCustomers from live_streamer s -- 送礼：日 left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as xu from live_daily_report where biz_date = #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) daily on daily.streamer_id = s.streamer_id -- 送礼：周 left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as xu from live_daily_report where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) weekly on weekly.streamer_id = s.streamer_id -- 送礼：上周 left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as xu from live_daily_report where biz_date between date_sub(#{beginDate}, interval (datediff(#{endDate}, #{beginDate}) + 1) day) and date_sub(#{beginDate}, interval 1 day) group by streamer_id ) lastWeek on lastWeek.streamer_id = s.streamer_id left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as xu from live_daily_report where biz_date between date_sub(#{endDate}, interval weekday(#{endDate}) day) and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) currentWeek on currentWeek.streamer_id = s.streamer_id left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as xu from live_daily_report where biz_date between date_sub(date_sub(#{endDate}, interval weekday(#{endDate}) day), interval 7 day) and date_sub(date_sub(#{endDate}, interval weekday(#{endDate}) day), interval 1 day) group by streamer_id ) currentLastWeek on currentLastWeek.streamer_id = s.streamer_id -- 送礼：月 left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as xu from live_daily_report where biz_date between date_format(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-01') and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) monthly on monthly.streamer_id = s.streamer_id -- 送礼 KPI：始终按截止日期所在自然月累计，不受自定义区间起始日影响 left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as xu from live_daily_report where biz_date between date_format(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-01') and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) kpiMonth on kpiMonth.streamer_id = s.streamer_id -- 新增粉丝：首次出现的客户（只统计有聊天记录的） left join ( select c.streamer_id, count(distinct case when c.first_seen_date = #{endDate} then c.customer_id end) as daily, count(distinct case when c.first_seen_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} then c.customer_id end) as weekly, count(distinct case when c.first_seen_date between date_sub(#{beginDate}, interval (datediff(#{endDate}, #{beginDate}) + 1) day) and date_sub(#{beginDate}, interval 1 day) then c.customer_id end) as lastWeek, count(distinct case when c.first_seen_date between date_format(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-01') and #{endDate} then c.customer_id end) as monthly from live_customer c where c.merged_into_id is null and exists (select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id) group by c.streamer_id ) newFans on newFans.streamer_id = s.streamer_id -- 新增互动：客户首次产生有效互动的日期落在对应统计周期内 left join ( select fi.streamer_id, count(distinct case when fi.first_interaction_date = #{endDate} then fi.customer_id end) as daily, count(distinct case when fi.first_interaction_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} then fi.customer_id end) as weekly, count(distinct case when fi.first_interaction_date between date_sub(#{beginDate}, interval (datediff(#{endDate}, #{beginDate}) + 1) day) and date_sub(#{beginDate}, interval 1 day) then fi.customer_id end) as lastWeek, count(distinct case when fi.first_interaction_date between date_format(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-01') and #{endDate} then fi.customer_id end) as monthly from ( select cc.streamer_id, cc.customer_id, min(cc.biz_date) as first_interaction_date from live_chat_contact cc join live_customer c on c.customer_id = cc.customer_id and c.streamer_id = cc.streamer_id and c.merged_into_id is null where cc.has_interaction = 1 group by cc.streamer_id, cc.customer_id ) fi group by fi.streamer_id ) chat on chat.streamer_id = s.streamer_id -- 新增用户打赏：首次打赏在对应周期，金额只统计首次打赏当天，保证月累计等于每日新增金额之和 left join ( select nf.streamer_id, count(distinct case when nf.first_gift_date = #{endDate} then nf.customer_id end) as daily, count(distinct case when nf.first_gift_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} then nf.customer_id end) as weekly, count(distinct case when nf.first_gift_date between date_format(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-01') and #{endDate} then nf.customer_id end) as monthly, sum(case when nf.first_gift_date = #{endDate} and gr.biz_date = #{endDate} then gr.xu else 0 end) as dailyAmount, sum(case when nf.first_gift_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and gr.biz_date = nf.first_gift_date then gr.xu else 0 end) as weeklyAmount, sum(case when nf.first_gift_date between date_sub(#{beginDate}, interval (datediff(#{endDate}, #{beginDate}) + 1) day) and date_sub(#{beginDate}, interval 1 day) and gr.biz_date = nf.first_gift_date then gr.xu else 0 end) as lastWeekAmount, sum(case when nf.first_gift_date between date_format(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-01') and #{endDate} and gr.biz_date = nf.first_gift_date then gr.xu else 0 end) as monthlyAmount from ( select streamer_id, customer_id, min(biz_date) as first_gift_date from live_gift_record gr group by gr.streamer_id, gr.customer_id ) nf join live_customer c on c.customer_id = nf.customer_id and c.streamer_id = nf.streamer_id and c.merged_into_id is null join live_gift_record gr on gr.streamer_id = nf.streamer_id and gr.customer_id = nf.customer_id group by nf.streamer_id ) newTippers on newTippers.streamer_id = s.streamer_id -- 客户统计 left join ( select streamer_id, count(*) as count, sum(case when total_xu >= 1000 then 1 else 0 end) as highValue from ( select streamer_id, customer_id, sum(xu) as total_xu from live_gift_record where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id, customer_id ) mc group by streamer_id ) monthlyCustomers on monthlyCustomers.streamer_id = s.streamer_id where s.status = '0'

select c.customer_id as customerId, c.nickname, c.badge, sum(gr.xu) as totalXu, count(distinct gr.biz_date) as activeDays, max(gr.biz_date) as lastActiveDate from live_gift_record gr join live_customer c on c.customer_id = gr.customer_id where gr.streamer_id = #{streamerId} and gr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by c.customer_id, c.nickname, c.badge having sum(gr.xu) >= 1000 order by totalXu desc

select s.streamer_id as streamerId, s.stage_name as stageName, coalesce(g.activeCustomers, 0) as activeCustomers, coalesce(c.chatCustomers, 0) as chatCustomers, coalesce(g.highValueCustomers, 0) as highValueCustomers, case when coalesce(g.activeCustomers, 0) = 0 then 0 else round(coalesce(c.chatCustomers, 0) * 100 / g.activeCustomers, 1) end as contactRate from live_streamer s left join ( select streamer_id, count(*) as activeCustomers, sum(case when total_xu >= 1000 then 1 else 0 end) as highValueCustomers from ( select streamer_id, customer_id, sum(xu) as total_xu from live_gift_record where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id, customer_id ) gc group by streamer_id ) g on g.streamer_id = s.streamer_id left join ( select streamer_id, count(distinct customer_id) as chatCustomers from live_chat_contact where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) c on c.streamer_id = s.streamer_id where s.status = '0'
order by contactRate asc, s.streamer_id

select s.streamer_id as streamerId, s.stage_name as stageName, coalesce(stats.red, 0) as red, coalesce(stats.green, 0) as green, coalesce(stats.purple, 0) as purple, coalesce(stats.yellow, 0) as yellow, coalesce(stats.orange, 0) as orange, coalesce(stats.total, 0) as total from live_streamer s left join ( select x.streamer_id, sum(case when x.has_gift = 1 and x.has_chat = 0 and x.has_follow = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as red, sum(case when x.has_gift = 1 and x.has_chat = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as green, sum(case when x.has_gift = 1 and x.has_chat = 0 and x.has_follow = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as purple, sum(case when x.has_gift = 0 and x.has_chat = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as yellow, sum(case when x.has_gift = 0 and x.has_chat = 0 and x.has_contact_no_interaction = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as orange, count(*) as total from ( select c.streamer_id, c.customer_id, case when exists ( select 1 from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr.biz_date = #{statDate} ) and ( select coalesce(sum(gr2.xu), 0) from live_gift_record gr2 where gr2.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr2.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and date_format(gr2.biz_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(#{statDate}, '%Y-%m') ) >= 1000 then 1 else 0 end as has_gift, case when exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date = #{statDate} and cc.has_interaction = 1 ) then 1 else 0 end as has_chat, case when exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date = #{statDate} and cc.has_interaction = 0 ) then 1 else 0 end as has_contact_no_interaction, case when exists ( select 1 from live_follow_record fr where fr.customer_id = c.customer_id and fr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and fr.biz_date = #{statDate} and fr.follow_status = 'pending' ) then 1 else 0 end as has_follow from live_customer c where c.merged_into_id is null and ( (exists (select 1 from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr.biz_date = #{statDate}) and (select coalesce(sum(gr2.xu), 0) from live_gift_record gr2 where gr2.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr2.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and date_format(gr2.biz_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(#{statDate}, '%Y-%m')) >= 1000) or exists (select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date = #{statDate}) ) ) x group by x.streamer_id ) stats on stats.streamer_id = s.streamer_id where s.status = '0'
order by s.streamer_id
select ai_result as aiResult from live_upload where streamer_id = #{streamerId} and upload_type = '2' and ai_status = '2' and ai_result is not null order by biz_date desc limit #{limit}

select s.streamer_id as streamerId, s.stage_name as stageName, coalesce(reportMonthly.xu, 0) as monthlyXu, coalesce(monthly.customers, 0) as tipCustomers, coalesce(chat.customers, 0) as chatCustomers, coalesce(weiji.red, 0) as silentCount, coalesce(weiji.total, 0) as weijiTotal from live_streamer s left join ( select streamer_id, sum(total_xu) as xu from live_daily_report where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) reportMonthly on reportMonthly.streamer_id = s.streamer_id left join ( select streamer_id, count(distinct customer_id) as customers from live_gift_record where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) monthly on monthly.streamer_id = s.streamer_id left join ( select streamer_id, count(distinct customer_id) as customers from live_chat_contact where biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} group by streamer_id ) chat on chat.streamer_id = s.streamer_id left join ( select c.streamer_id, sum(case when x.has_gift = 1 and x.has_chat = 0 and x.has_follow = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as red, count(*) as total from ( select c2.customer_id, c2.streamer_id, case when exists ( select 1 from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c2.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c2.streamer_id and gr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and gr.xu >= 1000 ) then 1 else 0 end as has_gift, case when exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c2.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c2.streamer_id and cc.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and cc.has_interaction = 1 ) then 1 else 0 end as has_chat, case when exists ( select 1 from live_follow_record fr where fr.customer_id = c2.customer_id and fr.streamer_id = c2.streamer_id and fr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and fr.follow_status = 'pending' ) then 1 else 0 end as has_follow from live_customer c2 where c2.merged_into_id is null ) x join live_customer c on c.customer_id = x.customer_id and c.streamer_id = x.streamer_id where x.has_gift = 1 group by c.streamer_id ) weiji on weiji.streamer_id = s.streamer_id where s.status = '0'
order by s.streamer_id

select c.customer_id as customerId, c.nickname, c.badge, (select coalesce(sum(gr_m.xu), 0) from live_gift_record gr_m where gr_m.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr_m.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr_m.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}) as totalXu, (select count(distinct gr_m.biz_date) from live_gift_record gr_m where gr_m.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr_m.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr_m.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}) as redDays, (select group_concat(distinct day(gr_m.biz_date) order by gr_m.biz_date separator ', ') from live_gift_record gr_m where gr_m.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr_m.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr_m.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}) as redDates from live_customer c where c.merged_into_id is null and c.streamer_id = #{streamerId} and exists ( select 1 from live_gift_record gr_d where gr_d.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr_d.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr_d.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} ) and not exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date = ( select max(gr3.biz_date) from live_gift_record gr3 where gr3.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr3.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr3.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} ) and cc.has_interaction = 1 ) and not exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc_later where cc_later.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc_later.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc_later.biz_date > ( select max(gr4.biz_date) from live_gift_record gr4 where gr4.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr4.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr4.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} ) and cc_later.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} ) and not exists ( select 1 from live_follow_record fr where fr.customer_id = c.customer_id and fr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and fr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and fr.follow_status = 'pending' ) order by totalXu desc

select s.streamer_id as streamerId, s.stage_name as stageName, coalesce(stats.red, 0) as red, coalesce(stats.green, 0) as green, coalesce(stats.purple, 0) as purple, coalesce(stats.yellow, 0) as yellow, coalesce(stats.orange, 0) as orange, coalesce(stats.total, 0) as total from live_streamer s left join ( select x.streamer_id, -- 红色：月累计>1000 且该客户最后一天有打赏无互动 sum(case when x.month_total >= 1000 and x.last_gift_has_chat = 0 and x.last_day_is_yellow = 0 and x.last_day_is_orange = 0 and x.has_follow = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as red, -- 绿色：月累计>1000 且该客户最后一天有打赏有互动 sum(case when x.month_total >= 1000 and ( x.last_gift_has_chat = 1 or x.last_day_is_yellow = 1 or x.last_day_is_orange = 1 ) then 1 else 0 end) as green, -- 紫色：月累计>1000、最后一天无互动，但主播已关注等待回关 sum(case when x.month_total >= 1000 and x.last_gift_has_chat = 0 and x.last_day_is_yellow = 0 and x.last_day_is_orange = 0 and x.has_follow = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as purple, -- 黄色：出现过黄色（无打赏有互动） sum(case when x.month_total < 1000 and x.last_day_is_yellow = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as yellow, -- 橙色：出现过橙色（有建联无互动） sum(case when x.month_total < 1000 and x.last_day_is_orange = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as orange, sum(case when x.month_total >= 1000 or (x.month_total < 1000 and (x.last_day_is_yellow = 1 or x.last_day_is_orange = 1)) then 1 else 0 end) as total from ( select c.streamer_id, c.customer_id, -- 月累计打赏 coalesce((select sum(gr.xu) from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}), 0) as month_total, -- 该客户周期内最后一次打赏那天是否有互动 case when exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.has_interaction = 1 and cc.biz_date = ( select max(gr.biz_date) from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} ) ) then 1 else 0 end as last_gift_has_chat, case when exists ( select 1 from live_follow_record fr where fr.customer_id = c.customer_id and fr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and fr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and fr.follow_status = 'pending' ) then 1 else 0 end as has_follow, case when coalesce((select max(cc.biz_date) from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}), '1000-01-01') > coalesce((select max(gr.biz_date) from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}), '1000-01-01') and exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.has_interaction = 1 and cc.biz_date = ( select max(cc2.biz_date) from live_chat_contact cc2 where cc2.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc2.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc2.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} ) ) then 1 else 0 end as last_day_is_yellow, case when coalesce((select max(cc.biz_date) from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}), '1000-01-01') > coalesce((select max(gr.biz_date) from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}), '1000-01-01') and exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.has_interaction = 0 and cc.biz_date = ( select max(cc2.biz_date) from live_chat_contact cc2 where cc2.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc2.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc2.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} ) ) then 1 else 0 end as last_day_is_orange, -- 是否出现过黄色（本月无打赏有互动） case when exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and cc.has_interaction = 1 and not exists ( select 1 from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and gr.xu >= 1000 ) ) then 1 else 0 end as ever_yellow, -- 是否出现过橙色（有建联无互动） case when exists ( select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate} and cc.has_interaction = 0 ) then 1 else 0 end as ever_orange from live_customer c where c.merged_into_id is null and ( (select coalesce(sum(gr.xu), 0) from live_gift_record gr where gr.customer_id = c.customer_id and gr.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and gr.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}) >= 1000 or exists (select 1 from live_chat_contact cc where cc.customer_id = c.customer_id and cc.streamer_id = c.streamer_id and cc.biz_date between #{beginDate} and #{endDate}) ) ) x group by x.streamer_id ) stats on stats.streamer_id = s.streamer_id where s.status = '0'
order by s.streamer_id
